message.content:
[
  {
    "title": "ISSP 1989 – Work Orientations I",
    "year": 1989,
    "topics": ["Employment"],
    "summary": "First ISSP module on attitudes toward work, job satisfaction, employment conditions, and work values in a comparative international perspective.",
    "publisher": "GESIS"
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP 1997 – Work Orientations II",
    "year": 1997,
    "topics": ["Employment"],
    "summary": "Second ISSP module on work orientations, covering job preferences, employment relations, and perceptions of work in comparative context.",
    "publisher": "GESIS"
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP 2005 – Work Orientations III",
    "year": 2005,
    "topics": ["Employment"],
    "summary": "Third ISSP module examining attitudes toward work, employment conditions, job satisfaction, and work-life balance across countries.",
    "publisher": "GESIS"
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP 2015 – Work Orientations IV",
    "year": 2015,
    "topics": ["Employment"],
    "summary": "Fourth ISSP module on work orientations, including views on employment, job quality, work-life balance, and broader labor market perceptions.",
    "publisher": "GESIS"
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP 2007 – Leisure Time and Sports",
    "year": 2007,
    "topics": ["Leisure, tourism and sport"],
    "summary": "ISSP module focusing on leisure activities, sports participation, cultural engagement, and time use across countries.",
    "publisher": "GESIS"
  },
  {
    "title": "Eurobarometer – Sport and Physical Activity",
    "year": 2014,
    "topics": ["Leisure, tourism and sport"],
    "summary": "EU-wide survey measuring participation in sport and physical activity, barriers and motivations, and related health perceptions.",
    "publisher": "GESIS"
  },
  {
    "title": "Eurobarometer – Quality of Life in European Cities",
    "year": 2015,
    "topics": ["Community, urban and rural life", "Housing"],
    "summary": "Survey of residents’ perceptions of urban living, local services, environment, housing, and community life in European cities.",
    "publisher": "GESIS"
  },
  {
    "title": "ALLBUS (German General Social Survey) – 2014",
    "year": 2014,
    "topics": ["Employment", "Leisure, tourism and sport", "Community, urban and rural life", "Housing"],
    "summary": "National survey of the German population including modules on social structure, employment, leisure, neighborhood, and housing conditions.",
    "publisher": "GESIS"
  },
  {
    "title": "European Values Study (EVS) – 2017",
    "year": 2017,
    "topics": ["Employment", "Leisure, tourism and sport", "Community, urban and rural life", "Housing"],
    "summary": "Cross-national survey on values and attitudes with coverage of work ethics, community involvement, leisure, and living conditions.",
    "publisher": "GESIS"
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP 2001 – Social Networks and Social Support",
    "year": 2001,
    "topics": ["Community, urban and rural life"],
    "summary": "ISSP module on social ties, neighborhood relations, community engagement, and sources of social support across countries.",
    "publisher": "GESIS"
  }
]
